pain_point: Highly-trained CPAs spending too much time manually extracting data from complex not-for-profit documents (like Form 990s, grant applications, and donor agreements) rather than focusing on high-value philanthropic advisory work.
draft_email: I noticed that Clark Nuber is hosting the 2026 Western Philanthropy Conference to explore emerging trends for not-for-profit advisors. As your Not-for-Profit practice grows and takes on more complex clients, your team likely spends an inordinate amount of time manually extracting data from lengthy tax-exempt documents and donor agreements instead of focusing on strategic advisory. Our Universal Document Analysis platform can automatically process and categorize these unstructured documents, giving your staff back the time they need to deliver high-value insights to your philanthropic clients.
